name: Flange Bolt Torque Application
expected_response_detailed: ASME PCC-1 Appendix E: torque values based on gasket type (spiral wound vs RX vs IX), bolt material B7 vs B16 vs 660. Torque pattern: star pattern in three increments (30%, 60%, 100%). Torque wrench calibration within 1 year. Torque value = K×D×F (friction factor, diameter, preload). Torque-turn alternative: torque to snug then turn nut specified angle. Mark bolts after final torque. Re-torque after 24-hour settlement. Temperature limits for gasket relaxation.

name: Pipeline Marker Inspection
expected_response_detailed: 192.707 requirements: markers every 800 feet in non-rural, every 300 feet in urban, at road crossings, at water crossings, buried test leads. Marker content: owner name, emergency number, product (gas pipeline), One-Call reference. Visibility: 4-foot vegetation clearance. Condition: legible, upright, not damaged. GPS coordinates in database. Annual patrol or ROW surveillance. Replacement if 25% illegible or knocked over. Additional markers if public activity near line.

name: Above Ground Pipeline Support
expected_response_detailed: API 570 inspection: support spacing per stress analysis, soil settlement at supports, corrosion under supports (CUPS inspection), pipe-to-support contact wear, thermal movement accommodation, expansion joint/loop inspection, weight distribution, load path changes, bolt tightness on supports, weld examination at shoe attachments. Concrete deterioration: spalling, rebar exposure. Sliding supports: maintenance of low-friction surface.

name: Corrosion Coupon Installation
expected_response_detailed: NACE SP0775: coupon types (C1018 steel for gas pipelines), flush vs extended mount, placement in flowstream not bypass, 6-month exposure minimum, triplicate coupons for statistical validity, orientation (horizontal for liquid, vertical for gas), metallurgical analysis for pitting. Calculation: mpy = (K×W)/(D×A×T) where K=constant, W=weight loss, D=density, A=area, T=time in years. Coupon retrieval without damage to sample.

name: Bend Radius Verification
expected_response_detailed: API 5L induction bends: minimum radius 5D for cold bends (field), 3D for hot (induction), 2.5D for thick-wall. Ovality limit 3% per 5L. Thinnest point measurement: wall reduction limit 12.5% of nominal. Wrinkle acceptance: none allowed for piggable lines. Ultrasonic thickness mapping: 8-point minimum per cross-section. Angle verification: ±2 degrees. Hardness: Hv 250 max for X65 to verify no damage.

name: Pipeline ROW Encroachment
expected_response_detailed: Encroachment types: structures within easement, vegetation taller than 3 feet (visibility), excavation without notification, overhead power lines, storage materials. Actions: initial notification to landowner, legal action if not removed, compensation negotiation for permanent structures. Survey: GPS coordinates of encroachment, photo documentation. Clearances: 10 feet either side for maintenance access. No permanent structures within strip unless approved. Annual surveillance required.

name: Weld Repair Procedure
expected_response_detailed: API 1104 repair: excavation to visual 360° weld exposure, defect removal by grinding or air-arc, minimum removal 2 inches beyond visible defect, preheat per WPS (100°F minimum if ambient <50°F), repair weld sequence (opposite sides sequentially), examination 100% UT or RT. Repair limitations: one repair per defect location, if repair requires second removal then cut-out required, cut-out length 10 inches minimum, new weld full circumference.

name: Odorant System Inspection
expected_response_detailed: 192.625 odorization: mercaptan or thiophane injection. Odorant level check weekly: tetrahedron threshold 1/5 or 5 odorant units. Equipment: pump or wick injection, flow-proportioning, tank level monitoring. Safety: PPE for handling (organic vapor cartridges), secondary containment, spill response kit. Injection rate 0.5-1.0 lb/MMscf typical, up to 2.0 for dense gas or odor fade. Inspection: leaks, injection pump operation, tank connections, vapor recovery.

name: External Coating Inspection
expected_response_detailed: Holiday detection: 15-40 kV depending on coating thickness (100V/mil typical). Adhesion: peel test or pull-off per ASTM D4541. Thickness: magnetic gauge orToo measurement. Percent coverage: visual inspection for 100% coverage. RFI (random field inspection) if 95%+ coverage. Disbondment: holiday size measurement and mapping. Tape wrap: overlap minimum 1-inch, percentage of overlap per specification typically 55%. Shrink sleeves: patch size limits, overlap.

name: Pressure Equipment Certification
expected_response_detailed: ASME Section VIII vessel: nameplate data (MAWP, MDMT, year built, serial), inspection interval based on service (3-5 years typical), inspection scope includes thickness survey, internal/external examination, nozzle and shell welds (MT/PT), relief valve certification (stamped NB), inspection report per NBIC, R-stamp if repairs made, alteration documentation, pressure test if repairs, continued service if inspection acceptable. De-rating: documented engineering review, nameplate update.
